requirement_topic.en: Electrical Safety — Consumer Protection (Safety Requirements) Regulations and Singapore Safety Mark
requirement_topic.zh: 电气安全——《消费者保护（安全要求）条例》及新加坡安全标志
requirement_topic.zht: 電氣安全——《消費者保護（安全要求）規例》及新加坡安全標誌

summary.en: Electrical products listed as Controlled Goods under the Consumer Protection (Safety Requirements) Regulations (CPSR) — which includes many mains-powered wireless and IoT devices, power adapters, and chargers — must bear the Singapore Safety Mark and be registered with Enterprise Singapore (ESG, formerly SPRING Singapore). Products must conform to applicable Singapore Standards (SS IEC series), including SS IEC 62368-1 for audio/video/IT and communications equipment. CE-marked power adapters are widely used but must formally demonstrate conformance to the applicable SS IEC standard for Singapore registration.
summary.zh: 依据《消费者保护（安全要求）条例》（CPSR）列为管制商品的电气产品——包括许多市电供电的无线及物联网设备、电源适配器和充电器——须加贴新加坡安全标志并向企业发展局（ESG，前身为标准、生产力与创新局SPRING Singapore）完成注册。产品须符合适用的新加坡标准（SS IEC系列），包括音视频/信息技术及通信设备适用的SS IEC 62368-1。CE认证电源适配器被广泛使用，但须正式证明符合新加坡注册所需的适用SS IEC标准。
summary.zht: 依據《消費者保護（安全要求）規例》（CPSR）列為管制商品的電氣產品——包括許多市電供電的無線及物聯網設備、電源適配器和充電器——須加貼新加坡安全標誌並向企業發展局（ESG，前身為標準、生產力與創新局SPRING Singapore）完成登記。產品須符合適用的新加坡標準（SS IEC系列），包括音視頻/資訊技術及通訊設備適用的SS IEC 62368-1。CE認證電源適配器被廣泛使用，但須正式證明符合新加坡登記所需的適用SS IEC標準。

standards_or_laws: Consumer Protection (Trade Descriptions and Safety Requirements) Act (Cap. 53), Singapore
SS IEC 62368-1 (Audio/video, IT and communications equipment — safety)
SS IEC 60335 series (Household and similar electrical appliances — safety, where applicable)

summary.en: CCC certification (China Compulsory Certification) under GB 4943.1 (safety of information technology equipment) covers electrical safety for ITE and many wireless devices in China. Power adapters and chargers typically require CCC under the applicable GB standard. GB 4943.1 is technically aligned with IEC 60950-1 (now transitioning to IEC 62368-1).
summary.zh: 依据GB 4943.1（信息技术设备安全）的CCC认证（中国强制认证）涵盖中国信息技术设备及许多无线设备的电气安全。电源适配器和充电器通常需依据适用GB标准取得CCC认证。GB 4943.1与IEC 60950-1技术内容接轨（现正过渡至IEC 62368-1）。
summary.zht: 依據GB 4943.1（資訊技術設備安全）的CCC認證（中國強制認證）涵蓋中國資訊技術設備及許多無線設備的電氣安全。電源適配器和充電器通常需依據適用GB標準取得CCC認證。GB 4943.1與IEC 60950-1技術內容接軌（現正過渡至IEC 62368-1）。

standards_or_laws: GB 4943.1 (Safety of information technology equipment, China)
GB 8898 (Audio, video and similar equipment safety, China)

gap.en: CCC certification is not recognised by ESG or accepted as evidence of conformance under Singapore's CPSR. The Singapore Safety Mark and ESG registration are separate mandatory steps for Controlled Goods. Test data to IEC 62368-1 (from CCC or CE processes) may support Singapore registration if it maps to the applicable SS IEC standard, but formal ESG registration and the Safety Mark are still required independently.
gap.zh: CCC认证不被ESG承认，也不能作为新加坡CPSR下的合规证据。新加坡安全标志及ESG注册是管制商品独立且强制的步骤。IEC 62368-1测试数据（来自CCC或CE流程）若与适用的SS IEC标准对应，可支持新加坡注册，但仍须独立完成ESG正式注册并取得安全标志。
gap.zht: CCC認證不被ESG承認，也不能作為新加坡CPSR下的合規證據。新加坡安全標誌及ESG登記是管制商品獨立且強制的步驟。IEC 62368-1測試數據（來自CCC或CE流程）若與適用的SS IEC標準對應，可支持新加坡登記，但仍須獨立完成ESG正式登記並取得安全標誌。

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Mains-powered wireless and IoT devices and their power adapters/chargers that are Controlled Goods under the CPSR require the Singapore Safety Mark and ESG registration before sale. CCC certification does not satisfy this requirement. IEC 62368-1 test data from existing CCC or CE processes may be leveraged to reduce re-testing, but independent ESG registration remains mandatory.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 属于CPSR管制商品的市电供电无线及物联网设备及其电源适配器/充电器，在销售前须取得新加坡安全标志并完成ESG注册。CCC认证不满足此要求。现有CCC或CE流程中的IEC 62368-1测试数据可用于减少重复测试，但独立的ESG注册仍为强制要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 屬於CPSR管制商品的市電供電無線及物聯網設備及其電源適配器/充電器，在銷售前須取得新加坡安全標誌並完成ESG登記。CCC認證不滿足此要求。現有CCC或CE流程中的IEC 62368-1測試數據可用於減少重複測試，但獨立的ESG登記仍為強制要求。
